# CWE-708: Incorrect Ownership Assignment
lang: go
file: CWE-708-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"strconv"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: uploaded file ownership is assigned to a client-provided uid.
func FinishUpload(c *gin.Context) {
	dest := c.PostForm("dest")
	owner := c.PostForm("owner_uid")
	uid, _ := strconv.Atoi(owner)
	if err := os.Chown(dest, uid, uid); err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusInternalServerError, err.Error())
		return
	}
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
